data.name: Prepare Uranus: Exploring Black Holes for Adults
data.detailed_description:
Prepare Uranus is NSFW Visual Novel, where you're taking control of a bar on the planet Uranus, in which beautiful girls work. You have to improve the economy of your bar, pay off debts to space pirates, unravel the mystery of Black Holes and make Uranus the most popular place in the galaxy!
The game is full of hand drawn sex scenes and animations, has the original soundtracks

-11 hand drawn animations for adults
-10+ high quality hand-painted adult scenes
-Storyline with 10+ characters total
-System for gaining experience and levels for characters

The game is full of hand drawn sex scenes and animations, has the original soundtracks

-10+ high quality hand-painted adult scenes

data.short_description: Prepare Uranus is NSFW Visual Novel, where you're taking control of a bar on the planet Uranus, in which beautiful girls work. You have to improve the economy of your bar, pay off debts to space pirates, unravel the mystery of Black Holes and make Uranus the most popular place in the galaxy!
data.supported_languages: 英文, 俄文, 簡體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7,8
  • 處理器: Intel® Pentium® IV+
  • 記憶體: 3 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: with 512 MB VRAM compatible with DirectX 9.0
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 2500 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX® Compatible
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel i5+
  • 記憶體: 6 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: with 512 MB VRAM compatible with DirectX 9.0
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 2500 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: AMD or Nvidia with VRAM 1GB or better

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.6
  • 處理器: Intel Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Open GL® compatible
  • 儲存空間: 2500 MB 可用空間
mac_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.6+
  • 處理器: Intel i5+
  • 記憶體: 6 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Open GL® compatible
  • 儲存空間: 2500 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Linux x86/x86_64
  • 處理器: Intel® Pentium® IV+
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Open GL® compatible
  • 儲存空間: 2500 MB 可用空間
linux_requirements.recommended:
